query:
SELECT p.id as property_id, p.name as property_name, r.id as room_id, r.room_number
FROM peppr_properties p
JOIN peppr_rooms r ON r.property_id = p.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Pearl%'
ORDER BY r.room_number;
